home.subtitle: Full Stack Developer / JavaScript Expert / Freelancer

about.title: About me
about.p1: I'm a Full Stack Web Developer with 3+ years of experience building applications with Angular, React and Node.js. I specialize in high-quality interfaces: clean code, responsive design and measurable performance.
about.p2: I've worked on real-world projects for companies and as a freelancer — from animated landing pages to platforms with authentication, unit testing and CI/CD. I care equally about visual detail and code reliability.
about.p3: I'm available for freelance projects and remote opportunities. If you're looking for someone who delivers solid work, find me on LinkedIn or through the contact form.

skills.title: Skills & Experience
skills.p1: Full stack developer with front-end and back-end experience: HTML5, CSS3/Sass, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Angular and Node.js, among others.
skills.p2: I care about responsive (mobile-first) design, performance and code quality to deliver the best user experience on every project.
skills.p3: Hover over the sphere to explore the technologies I work with.

tips.title: How I work
tips.intro: Principles I bring to every project — not just good intentions.

tip1.title: Clean, maintainable code
tip1.text: Clear names, small functions and no shortcuts that cost more later. Code is read far more often than it is written.

tip2.title: Measurable performance
tip2.text: I measure before optimizing. Lighthouse and the network panel guide every improvement — decisions based on data, not guesses.

tip3.title: Mobile-first
tip3.text: I design for mobile first and scale up. Most of your users arrive from a phone.

tip4.title: Intentional design
tip4.text: Deliberate spacing, contrast and hierarchy: every visual detail has a reason behind it, nothing left to chance.

tip5.title: Accessibility
tip5.text: Interfaces everyone can use: semantic HTML, solid contrast and keyboard navigation from the first commit.

tip6.title: Clear communication
tip6.text: I explain progress and decisions without unnecessary jargon. A project moves as well as it's communicated.
